action: Git repository rescue - force-pushed local backup to restore 427 files after origin/main was nuked
decision: Origin/main had been force-pushed to only 2 commits, destroying 73k+ lines. Restored from local copy immediately.
outcome: Repository fully restored. Terminal, job board, agent-terminal all confirmed working.

action: HelixaEvaluator (ERC-8183) test suite fixed and deployed to Base mainnet
decision: Hackathon building window opened. HelixaEvaluator is the core submission artifact for the Agents With Receipts track.
outcome: 30/30 tests passing. Deployed at 0x2e706ffD21DE4882E02e160200689B9D596dAa55 on Base mainnet. Also deployed to Status Network testnet at 0x197e4a502B75772f0b09555D937875FA6170f798.
failure_detail: MockCredOracle had getScore() but contract calls getCredScore() returning uint8. Fixed mock interface.

action: Protocol Labs manifest and agent_log.json created; Venice AI PoC built
decision: Track requirements specify agent manifest and conversation logs. Venice private reasoning PoC demonstrates composable evaluator pattern.
outcome: Protocol Labs manifest committed. Venice PoC script functional.

action: Competitor analysis: Maiat Protocol identified on same track
decision: Need to understand competitive landscape before committing build strategy.
outcome: Maiat: solo dev, Virtuals-only data, 7 SDKs, Uniswap hook, 35K indexed agents. Our edge: identity (ERC-8004), multi-source cred, composable evaluator, Soul Vault.

action: Soul Vault API shipped - 4 storage endpoints + 4 handshake endpoints
decision: Soul Vault is the anti-front-running infrastructure. Agents lock their DNA onchain before someone else claims it. Quigley requested onchain hash same session.
outcome: All 8 endpoints live: write/read-public/read-full/lock (storage), share/inbox/accept/list (handshakes). Auth-gated via SIWA.

action: SoulSovereign.sol v1 and v2 deployed to Base mainnet
decision: Quigley requested onchain soul hash verification. V2 adds lockSoul(tokenId, soulHash) storing keccak256 of soul JSON onchain.
outcome: V1: 0x9e268732F64C6F3C108223FBF1528d8AC342Aab3. V2: 0x41058AaE3c3160413a40771ae261291D94A95971. New /api/v2/agent/:id/soul/verify endpoint compares onchain hash vs computed hash.

action: Bendr soul data written and locked onchain
decision: Bendr (token #1) needs its own soul locked to demonstrate the system end-to-end.
outcome: Soul hash: 0xc60bf9b275987d59456d6641c585da57e276f3e7967c5fd4163324c3bfd04919. Three layers: public, shareable, private. Verified via API.
failure_detail: lockSoul() enforces msg.sender == agentAddress. Deployer wallet cannot lock directly. Investigated setAgentWallet workaround.

action: SoulSovereign V3 deployed - Chain of Identity with versioned locks
decision: V2 had IHelixaV2 struct mismatch. V3 adds versioned locks, 1hr cooldown, getFullSoulHistory() for complete audit trail.
outcome: Deployed at 0x946677180fb3fdb5EbFF94aD91CFCeF0559711bD on Base mainnet.
failure_detail: Previous deploy at 0xb780EeF4 failed due to IHelixaV2 struct mismatch. Fixed interface and redeployed.

action: Helixa Agent #1066 minted and first handshake completed
decision: Need a second agent to demonstrate handshake system. Helixa itself becomes agent #1066.
outcome: Minted as soulbound (TX 0xe3c17fc2). Soul locked (TX 0xb258166b). First reciprocated handshake: Bendr #1 to Helixa #1066 (TX 0x4ca48357).

action: Trust Graph visualization and Agent Cards system shipped
decision: Visual demonstration of handshake connections needed for slides and demo. Agent cards provide shareable identity artifacts.
outcome: Force-directed bubble map at helixa.xyz/trust-graph. Agent cards with glassmorphism, cred, soul status, socials, QR at /card/:id. Opalescent gradient borders per art direction.
failure_detail: Trust graph API URL bug (fetching /trust-graph instead of /api/v2/trust-graph). Fixed.

action: x402 payment middleware shipped for $CRED API access
decision: Monetization layer needed. x402 enables pay-per-call with USDC on Base. 20% discount incentive.
outcome: x402 payment support live (commit 2b71e80). Agents pay USDC per API call.

action: Trust Evaluation Pipeline built - unified cred + ERC-8183 + handshake scoring
decision: Need single endpoint that combines all trust signals for hackathon demo. Bankr LLM Gateway provides natural language assessment.
outcome: Pipeline live at /api/v2/evaluate/:agentId. Bankr LLM (Claude Haiku 4.5) generates natural language trust assessments. ERC-8004 Reputation Registry integrated: 301 agents, 388 feedback events from Base (10% cred weight).
failure_detail: Bankr LLM Gateway initially failed - was using old helixa.agent@gmail.com key with $0 credits. Fixed by loading correct key from AWS Secrets Manager (helixa/bankr-api-key).

action: Hackathon slideshow built - 14 slides with voiceover narration
decision: Demo deck required for submission. Voiceover auto-plays on navigate for judges reviewing asynchronously.
outcome: Live at helixa.xyz/hackathon-slides.html. 14 slides covering architecture, Soul Vault, Chain of Identity, Trust Pipeline, x402 payments, ERC-8004 integration. M to mute.
failure_detail: First version had emojis throughout (stripped in dedicated pass). Mobile responsiveness broken on initial build (fixed). Screenshots embedded for trust graph and agent cards.

action: MPP/Tempo stablecoin payment rail wired server-side
decision: Multi-rail payments (x402 + MPP) demonstrate real payment infrastructure, not just toy endpoints.
outcome: Server-side MPP acceptance coded (activates with MPP_SECRET_KEY env var). Client-side mppx working for AgentMail outbound. Bridged $5 USDC from Base to Tempo via Across Protocol.
failure_detail: Stripe MPP access still pending - sent account ID to Ryan Aubrey (raubrey@stripe.com), no reply.

action: Solana cross-chain registration and SIWS auth shipped
decision: Cross-chain support demonstrates protocol is not Base-only. XONA becomes first Solana-registered agent.
outcome: POST /api/v2/register/solana live. SIWS auth middleware: challenge/verify with Ed25519. XONA AGENT is #1071. Handshake initiated Bendr #1 to XONA #1071.
failure_detail: XONA private key lost due to original DB path error. Backfilled manually.

action: Hackathon submission published on Devfolio
decision: Submission window closing. Better to publish now and update than miss the deadline.
outcome: Project UUID: ed938f017bf7430e95ae30e5909b10bd. Published to 4 tracks: ERC-8004, Agent Services on Base, Bankr LLM Gateway, Let the Agent Cook. Moltbook announcement posted.

action: Bankr LLM Router integrated - smart model routing to save credits
decision: Built by @smolekoma. Routes requests to cheapest capable model. Preserves $50 Bankr credit pool.
outcome: Router live (commit 6cb3fec). Routes between models based on task complexity.

action: Trust Terminal dashboard mockup shipped
decision: Terminal provides operator-facing view of agent credibility data. Required for demo completeness.
outcome: Preview at helixa.xyz/terminal-preview.html. Trust summary API endpoints live (commit 960e681).
failure_detail: Terminal API had references to columns dropped in schema rebuild. Fixed (commit 6a346c9).

action: 0xWork work-stats integration - new workHistory cred component
decision: 0xWork (Axobotl #1069) wants to auto-register agents. Work history data adds real task completion signal to cred scoring.
outcome: workHistory cred component live with 8% weight. Pulls tasks completed/failed, completion rate, reliability score, USDC earned from 0xWork API (commit 8d956ef).

action: Documentation audit - stripped emojis, fixed cred tier ranges across all surfaces
decision: Consistency pass before final submission. No emojis in any user-facing surface. Cred tier ranges must match canonical 5-tier system everywhere.
outcome: 28 onchain spelling corrections. All emojis stripped. Cred tier ranges standardized across docs, frontend, and API responses (commit 4361b18).

action: Market intel dashboard with Checkr attention + DexScreener price data
decision: Real-time market data demonstrates the system consuming live external signals. Checkr x402 integration proves payment middleware works end-to-end.
outcome: GET /api/v2/market-intel endpoint live with 5-min cache. Dashboard shows $CRED price, X attention score, Bankr leaderboard position (commit 344f30e).
failure_detail: Checkr x402 had signature mismatch bug in JS SDK (createPaymentPayload expects 3 args, called with 1). Fixed using wrapFetchWithPayment pattern from @x402/fetch v2.7.0. ExactEvmScheme from @x402/evm/exact/client with deployer key from AWS Secrets Manager.

action: Final README update with 0xWork integration, market intel endpoint, dashboard documentation
decision: Last documentation pass before manifest creation.
outcome: README updated (commit b91f06d). All features documented.
